name: Ran Yang
bio: Professor in the Physics Department and a co-founder and director of MCP.

bio: Assistant Professor in the Physics Department and an MCP co-founder who now advises the program.

name: Julia Rodrigues
bio: Julia ('26) is our Program Assistant. She is studying Physics with an EPAD concentration and plans to pursue electrical engineering.

name: Kalea Wen
bio: Kalea is a junior majoring in physics and minoring in CS. She is our new event coordinator.

name: Erica Trindade
bio: Hi! I'm Erica and I am a sophomore majoring in physics who will hopefully pursue Mechanical Engineering in the future. I am so excited to be the assistant events coordinator!

name: Brielle Kirk
bio: Brielle (‘29) is our assistant PR coordinator. She plans to major in Physics and later pursue a PhD in Astrophysics.

bio: Alan ('26) is the MCP web developer. He is a senior studying Computer Science and Applied Math
